name: HONEYWELL INTERNATIONAL INC
summary: Honeywell International Inc is a diversified industrial technology company operating across four segments: Aerospace Technologies (avionics, propulsion, defense systems), Industrial Automation (sensing, process solutions, warehouse automation), Building Automation (building products and solutions), and Energy and Sustainability Solutions (UOP refining/petrochemical technologies). The company serves commercial aviation, defense, industrial, and energy markets globally, offering both hardware products and software-enabled services.
